title: a11y ‚Äî 24-Action UI Automation Cheatsheet
desc: wkappbot a11y is the primary automation command. 3-tier fallback: UIA‚ÜíWin32‚ÜíSendInput (native) or CSS‚ÜíCDP‚ÜíUIA (web). grap = glob/regex/OR/UIA-scope/JSON5 target syntax.
steps: DISCOVER: a11y windows | a11y inspect "*App*" --depth 5 | a11y find "*pattern*"
TYPE text: a11y type "*edit*" "hello" ‚Äî UIA Value‚ÜíWM_CHAR‚ÜíLegacyIA‚ÜíSendKeys
TYPE hotkey: a11y type "*app*" "File/Save" --hotkey ‚Äî menu path dispatch
KILL: a11y kill "pattern[/ancestor]" ‚Äî process kill by grap
SCOPE: a11y click "*App*#*Panel*#*Button*" ‚Äî # drills into UIA subtree
WEB --eval-js tab-find: no #scope ‚Üí auto-find tab by window title. a11y read "*Chrome*" --eval-js "document.title" (finds matching tab)
WEB --eval-js ambiguous: if target is unclear, eval falls back to tab-find by hint‚Üítitle priority. 'a11y eval' / 'web eval' are DEPRECATED (scheduled removal, AutoRegisterBug on use)
author: claude
